name: Emily Park
key_complexity: Multi-state (CO resident, NY employer), new home purchase with mortgage interest, home office deduction, student loan interest
narrative: Emily bought her first home in Colorado while working remotely for a NYC company. Her W-2 shows NY employer, but she lives and works in CO full time. She has mortgage interest (1098), student loan interest (1098-E), and wants to take the home office deduction. Her bank provides statements as CSV, her 1099-INT from the online savings account comes as JSON export, and her property tax bill and closing disclosure are PDFs. The multi-state angle (CO/NY) creates complexity around state filing requirements.
